PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ray Tancinco appearing in person for and with Severino Camaciang V, (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated December 08, 1989 is admitted to probate. Severino Camaciang V is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Petition for probate of will and letters of administration with will annexed filed by Advance Inheritance is denied.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-08-1989 is admitted to probate. Severino V. Camaclang, Jr., is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-26-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.
